x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CI association enables Now Assist to traverse CMDB relationships and calculate infrastructure blast radius for each change -- the foundation of AI-driven change risk analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Make cmdb_ci mandatory at change creation via UI policy. Target: 80%+ of change requests with CI association in the trailing 12 months. CI association enables Now Assist to calculate infrastructure blast radius for each change.
